name: buyback_arb
summary: Small-shareholder tender arb; edge on selected high-acceptance, high-premium small-caps. The one validated edge.

name: mean_reversion
summary: RSI + 20% below 200-DMA + quality. No edge vs buy-and-hold after costs; informational lens only.

name: smart_money_deals
summary: Follow institutional bulk/block buys. Post-disclosure return ~0 (front-run pre-event); informational lens only.

name: merger_arb
summary: Stock-swap long-target/short-acquirer. Thin, efficiently priced; deal-break tail risk.

name: open_offer_arb
summary: No small-shareholder reservation -> no structural edge. Control that proves the buyback thesis.
